title: Anna University Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
shortInfo: Candidates who have a Master’s Degree in Management are eligible to apply for these Manager - Relations & Fundraising vacancies. The offline application process for Anna University Manager - Relations & Fundraising Recruitment 2026 is currently open, and candidates can submit their applications until 12 June 2026.

basic_details.job_title: Anna University Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Candidates who have a Master’s Degree in Management are eligible to apply for these Manager - Relations & Fundraising vacancies. The offline application process for Anna University Manager - Relations & Fundraising Recruitment 2026 is currently open, and candidates can submit their applications until 12 June 2026.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 12-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Anna University Manager – Relations & Fundraising recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Manager – Relations & Fundraising posts at Anna University is 12-06-2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Manager – Relations & Fundraising post?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification required for the Manager – Relations & Fundraising position is a Master's Degree in Management. Ensure you meet this criterion before applying.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Manager – Relations & Fundraising position?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Manager – Relations & Fundraising role will receive a consolidated salary ranging from Rs. 45,000 to Rs. 50,000 per month.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Manager – Relations & Fundraising post?
faq.answer: Anna University is recruiting for a total of 2 vacancies for the post of Manager – Relations & Fundraising.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the Anna University Manager – Relations & Fundraising recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Manager – Relations & Fundraising role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Manager – Relations & Fundraising position at Anna University will primarily involve an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Manager – Relations & Fundraising position is contractual.

faq.question: Q9. Where is Anna University located?
faq.answer: Anna University is located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, with the pincode 600025.

faq.question: Q10. Can I apply online for this position?
faq.answer: No, the application mode for this recruitment is strictly offline. You need to download the application form and submit it manually as per the instructions.
